title: [BUG] writeFile(filename) can't export the image to the file
author: youareminelove
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->
when i use this function to export excel , but there is no image in the final excel file.


```javascript

const workbook = createAndFillWorkbook();
await workbook.xlsx.writeFile(filename);
```

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @youareminelove Can you provide the detailed code?
